name: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Supply of RMC / UCM / Components)
notes: Adagio Holdings A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer > About the job tractor beam.
description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job tractor beam.  We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at [DESTINATION].

For advice on salvaging, consult A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements  Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

name: Salvager Needed (Lrg. Special Order of RMC / UCM / Components)
notes: Adagio Holdings A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer > About the job tractor beam.
description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job tractor beam.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, even with the amount of ships buzzing through a system as populated as Stanton, so don't be surprised if you have to put a bit more effort into hunting down what's needed.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at [DESTINATION].

For advice on salvaging, consult A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements  Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.

A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job tractor beam. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at [DESTINATION].

notes: Adagio Holdings A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer > About the job tractor beam.
description:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job tractor beam.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at [DESTINATION].

For advice on salvaging, consult A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements  Disclaimer <

requires.name: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers

name: Claim #[CLAIM]: [SHIP] Salvage Rights
notes: Attention: Rights to a new Salvage Claim are available for purchase.
description:
Attention:

Rights to a new Salvage Claim are available for purchase. Exclusive access to the ship’s verified coordinates in monitored space will be provided upon confirmed credit transfer. The coordinates will remain accessible as long as the accepted contract is active. When you are satisfied with the amount of material you've salvaged, you may abandon the contract early with no penalty to clear the coordinates from your Starmap.

Claim #[CLAIM]:
• SHIP: [SHIP]
• CAUSE OF ACCIDENT: [SHIPSTORY]
• LOCATION: [LOCATION]

Adagio Rights Division

When you are satisfied with the amount of material you've salvaged, you may abandon the contract early with no penalty to clear the coordinates from your Starmap.

Adagio Rights Division

requires.name: Claim #[CLAIM]: [SHIP] Salvage Rights

name: Salvage Wrecked Ships on the Drift
notes: Got word there’s a few ships near [LOCATION] just floating all by their lonesome.
description:
Got word there’s a few ships near [LOCATION] just floating all by their lonesome. It’s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, we’ll sell them to you for a price. Then you’re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but I’m sure it won’t be anything you can’t handle.

- Smokey

name: Wrecked Ships for Sale
notes: Had a few wrecked ships towed to [LOCATION].
description:
Had a few wrecked ships towed to [LOCATION]. They’re fully out of commission and in dire need of scrapping. If you’re interested in salvaging what’s left, it can be all yours, for a fair price, too.

Plus, you don’t have to worry much about any distractions while you’re workin’ since you’ll be near one of our stations and we make sure folks behave themselves.

- Smokey
